---
title: "A 股 & 美股周报（自动生成）"
subtitle: "基于真实数据 + AI 摘要"
author: "Penny"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: flatly
    self-contained: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          /* 强制所有段落和代码块输出内容自动换行，防止长字符串溢出 */
          p, div, .cell-output, .cell-output-display {
            word-wrap: break-word;
            overflow-wrap: break-word;
            white-space: normal;
          }
        </style>
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    geometry: margin=2cm
    latex-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: "WenQuanYi Zen Hei"
    sansfont: "WenQuanYi Zen Hei"
    monofont: "WenQuanYi Zen Hei"
execute:
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
import json
import matplotlib
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import platform

# 根据操作系统自动选择合适的中文字体
system = platform.system()
if system == 'Windows':
    matplotlib.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'KaiTi']
elif system == 'Darwin':  # macOS
    matplotlib.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['Arial Unicode MS', 'Heiti TC', 'PingFang SC']
else:  # Linux (包括 GitHub Actions 的 Ubuntu)
    matplotlib.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['WenQuanYi Zen Hei', 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans']

matplotlib.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

with open('data/weekly_data.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    weekly_data = json.load(f)

with open('data/ai_summary.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    ai_summary = f.read()
```

# 本周市场概览

```{python}
#| echo: false
indices = {k: v for k, v in weekly_data.items() if k != 'sectors'}
df = pd.DataFrame(indices).T.reset_index()
df.columns = ['指数', '收盘价', '周涨跌幅(%)']
# 收盘价保留 4 位小数
df['收盘价'] = df['收盘价'].round(4)
df['方向'] = df['周涨跌幅(%)'].apply(lambda x: '上涨' if x >= 0 else '下跌')
df['显示'] = df.apply(lambda r: f"{r['方向']} {abs(r['周涨跌幅(%)']):.2f}%", axis=1)
df[['指数', '收盘价', '显示']]
```

# 本周行业热点

```{python}
#| echo: false
sectors = weekly_data.get('sectors', [])
if sectors:
    sectors_df = pd.DataFrame(sectors)
    sectors_df = sectors_df.sort_values('change_pct', ascending=False)
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
    colors = ['#c0392b' if v >= 0 else '#27ae60' for v in sectors_df['change_pct']]
    ax.barh(sectors_df['name'], sectors_df['change_pct'], color=colors)
    ax.axvline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.5)
    ax.set_title('本周行业涨跌幅排名（%）')
    ax.set_xlabel('涨跌幅（%）')
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
else:
    print("暂无行业数据")
```

# AI 生成市场摘要

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
print(f'<div style="word-wrap: break-word; overflow-wrap: break-word; white-space: normal;">{ai_summary}</div>')
```
